current_entries.en_definition: A legume resembling a nut, the fruit of the plant Arachis hypogaea, native to South America.

(literally) A shelly concretion, usually rounded, and having a brilliant luster, with varying tints, found in the mantle, or between the mantle and shell, of certain bivalve mollusks, especially in the pearl oysters and river mussels, and sometimes in certain univalves. It is usually due to a secretion of shelly substance around some irritating foreign particle. Its substance is the same as nacre, or mother-of-pearl. Round lustrous pearls are used in jewellery.
A small kiss.

examples.english: He gave her a peck on the cheek.
examples.chinese: 他在她的臉上輕輕的親了一下。

current_entries.en_definition: Of or pertaining to the breast, or chest.
A walker; one who walks or goes on foot, especially as opposed to one who uses a vehicle.
A chart, list, or record of ancestors, to show breeding, especially distinguished breeding. [from 15th c.]
The skin of an animal with the hair or wool on; either a raw or undressed hide, or a skin preserved with the hair or wool on it (sometimes worn as a garment with minimal modification).
(chiefly, Ireland, humorous, informal) Human skin, especially when bare; also, a person's hair.
A writing utensil with a graphite (commonly referred to as lead) shaft, usually blended with clay, clad in wood, and sharpened to a taper. [from 16th c.]

examples.english: You dropped your pencil.
examples.chinese: 你把你的铅笔弄掉了。

current_entries.en_definition: A piece of jewellery which hangs down as an ornament, especially worn on a chain around the neck. [from 15th c.]

examples.english: I'll give you this pendant.
examples.chinese: 我會給你這個墜飾。

current_entries.en_definition: Feeling pain or sorrow on account of one's sins or offenses; feeling sincere guilt.

(finance) An annuity paid regularly as benefit due to a retired employee, serviceman etc. in consideration of past services, originally and chiefly by a government but also by various private pension schemes. [from 16th c.]

A festival which falls on the seventh Sunday after Easter which commemorates the event described in Acts 2 of the Bible when the Holy Spirit descended upon the Apostles during the Jewish festival of Pentecost (sense 1), conferring on them the miraculous ability to explain the gospel in languages they did not know; also, the Sunday on which the festival is celebrated.
(UK, in, _, US, _, usually, formal) Next to last, second to last; immediately preceding the end of a sequence, list, etc.
a body of persons considered generally or collectively; a group of two or more persons.

examples.english: Most people think I'm crazy.
examples.chinese: 大部份的人覺得我瘋了。

current_entries.en_definition: A spice prepared from the fermented, dried, unripe berries of this plant.

examples.english: I seasoned the fish with salt and pepper.
examples.chinese: 我在魚上灑鹽和胡椒作調味。

current_entries.en_definition: Lasting or remaining active throughout the year, for multiple years, or all the time.
A pleasant smell; the scent, odor, or odoriferous particles emitted from a sweet-smelling substance; a pleasant odor.

examples.english: The perfume of roses filled the room.
examples.chinese: 玫瑰的香氣在房間的每一個角落裏飄蕩著。

current_entries.en_definition: (informal) Perquisite.
(inorganic chemistry) A divalent radical or anion containing two oxygen atoms linked by a covalent bond; any substance containing this group yields hydrogen peroxide when treated with an acid.
Of or pertaining to a particular person; relating to, or affecting, an individual, or each of many individuals
Done in person; without an intermediary.
(grammar) Related to grammatical first, second, etc. persons.
Of, from, or pertaining to Peru or the Peruvian people.
A club-shaped, round-headed stick used in a mortar to pound, crush, rub or grind things.
An animal kept as a companion or otherwise for pleasure, rather than for some practical benefit or use.
Any person or animal especially cherished and indulged; a darling.
(transitive, intransitive, informal) To stroke or fondle (another person) amorously.
(law, by extension) A formal written application made to a magistrate or court for an order or a suit for divorce. [from 1730s]
(medicine, pharmacy, pharmacology) Of or relating to pharmacy or pharmacists.
(photography) A picture created by projecting an image onto a photosensitive surface such as a chemically treated plate or film, CCD receptor, etc.

examples.english: Here is a photograph of my family.
examples.chinese: 這裡有一張我全家的照片。

current_entries.en_definition: (music) Softly, as a dynamic in a piece of music. [from 17th c.]

(musical instruments) A percussive keyboard musical instrument, usually ranging over seven octaves, with white and black colored keys, played by pressing these keys, causing hammers to strike strings. [from 1803]
(chiefly, US, Canada, Australia) A cucumber preserved in a solution, usually a brine or a vinegar syrup.
The meal eaten at such a gathering.

examples.english: How come Mary is going on a picnic with him?
examples.chinese: 为什么玛丽和他去野餐？

current_entries.en_definition: (figurative) An easy or pleasant task.
An administrative region in the north of Italy.
The act of pillaging.
A soft cushion used to support the head in bed.
A person who knows well the depths and currents of a harbor or coastal area, who is hired by a vessel to help navigate the harbor or coast.
Someone who solicits customers for prostitution and acts as manager for a group of prostitutes; a pander.
Having a colour between red and white; pale red.
Pale red.
A system of romanization for Standard Mandarin, used in the People’s Republic of China, and more recently in other Mandarin Chinese-speaking areas as well. [from 20th c.]
(transitive) To be the first to do or achieve (something), preparing the way for others to follow.
(anatomy) The pituitary gland together with the pituitary stalk.
A feeling of sympathy at the misfortune or suffering of someone or something.

examples.english: It's a pity when somebody dies.
examples.chinese: 有人死了的时候真是遗憾。

current_entries.en_definition: Something regrettable.
A set of intended actions, usually mutually related, through which one expects to achieve a goal.

examples.english: You must go through with your plan.
examples.chinese: 你必须按照你的计划行事。

current_entries.en_definition: (quantum mechanics) the constant of proportionality (symbol ℎ), relating the energy and frequency of a photon (6.626×10−34 joule-second); also related to the indeterminacy limit in the Heisenberg uncertainty principle; the quantum of action
Of a surface: flat or level.
(geometry) A flat surface extending infinitely in all directions (e.g. horizontal or vertical plane); a bounded portion thereof.
A mixture of lime or gypsum, sand, and water, sometimes with the addition of fibres, that hardens to a smooth solid and is used for coating walls and ceilings; render, stucco.
A cast made of plaster of Paris and gauze; a plaster cast.
A synthetic, solid, hydrocarbon-based polymer, whether thermoplastic or thermosetting.

examples.english: Plastic does not burn easily.
examples.chinese: 塑料不易燃烧。

current_entries.en_definition: (law) A bailment of personal property to secure payment of a debt without transfer of title.

examples.english: Unity, justice and freedom are the pledge of fortune.
examples.chinese: 团结、公正和自由是幸福的保证。

current_entries.en_definition: A more-than-adequate amount; plenitude.

examples.english: I have plenty of money with me.
examples.chinese: 我身上帶著很多錢。

current_entries.en_definition: (now, _, rare) A (neutral) condition or state. [from 14th c.]
(uncountable, UK, Irish, Commonwealth, informal) Cheap or inferior everyday wine.
(electricity) A pronged connecting device which fits into a mating socket, especially an electrical one.
An edible, fleshy stone fruit of Prunus domestica (European plum), often of a dark red or purple colour. [from 8th c.]

examples.english: Do you like plum cake?
examples.chinese: 你喜歡李子蛋糕嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: An instance of plundering.
A textile fabric with a nap or shag on one side, longer and softer than the nap of velvet.
The longest river in Italy, which flows 652 kilometers eastward to the Adriatic Sea near Venice.
(clothing) A bag stitched to an item of clothing, used for carrying small items.
Mien; bearing or deportment of the head or body.
A substance that is harmful or lethal to a living organism when ingested.
A person from Poland or of Polish descent.
A strong verbal or written attack on someone or something.
(North America, &, _, historical) A department of local (usually municipal) government responsible for general law enforcement.

examples.english: Call the police!
examples.chinese: 叫警察！

current_entries.en_definition: Of, from or native to Poland, or relating to the Polish language.
The language spoken in Poland.
A substance used to polish.
(also, figuratively) One who has mastered (especially when able to speak) several languages.

examples.english: It doesn't require you to be a polyglot.
examples.chinese: 您无需通晓多国语言。

current_entries.en_definition: (algebra, strict sense) An expression consisting of a sum of a finite number of terms, each term being the product of a constant coefficient and one or more variables raised to a non-negative integer power, such as a_n x^n + a_{n-1}x^{n-1} + ... + a_0 x^0.
A greasy or waxy substance that is used to style hair, making it look slick and shiny.
A rounded knob or handle.
A women's hairstyle in which the hair is swept upwards from the face and worn high over the forehead.
A tiny opening in the skin.
A person in control of the entrance to a building.
An allocated amount.
(usually, not comparable) Able but not certain to happen; neither inevitable nor impossible.

examples.english: She's asking how that's possible.
examples.chinese: 她問這怎麼可能。

current_entries.en_definition: A marking made by a postal service on a delivery, usually indicating the place where and the date and time when the item was received or processed for the first time, mostly serving to cancel a postage stamp.
(logic) An axiom.
(rare) The position of someone or something relative to another; position; situation.
One who makes pots and other ceramic wares.

examples.english: The new Harry Potter movie is pretty lame.
examples.chinese: 哈利波特的新片十分差。

current_entries.en_definition: One's facial expression when pouting.

(physics, mechanics) A measure of the effectiveness that a force producing a physical effect has over time. If linear, the quotient of: (force multiplied by the displacement of or in an object) ÷ time. If rotational, the quotient of: (force multiplied by the angle of displacement) ÷ time.

examples.english: Don't underestimate my power.
examples.chinese: 不要小看我的力量。

current_entries.en_definition: Having, or capable of exerting, power or influence.
(historical) The ninth month of the French Republican Calendar, from May 20 or 21 to June 18 or 19.
(colloquial, figuratively) To strut about in a showy manner.
(ambitransitive) To talk much and to little purpose; to be loquacious; to speak foolishly.
(ambitransitive) To speak incessantly and in an inconsequential or childish manner; to babble.
(grammar) The part of the sentence (or clause) which states a property that a subject has or is characterized by.
(grammar) An element of the predicate of a sentence which complements the subject or object by means of the verb. Predicatives may be nominal or adjectival.

A beginning or introductory portion that comes before the main text of a document or book, typically serving to contextualize or explain the writing of the book and sometimes to acknowledge others' contributions; especially, such a discussion written by the work's own author.
(grammar, linguistic morphology) A morpheme added to the beginning of a word to modify its meaning, for example as, pre- in prefix, con- in conjure, re- in reheat, etc.
A preconception, any preconceived opinion or feeling, whether positive or negative.

examples.english: I don't have a prejudice against foreign workers.
examples.chinese: 我对外籍员工没有偏见。

current_entries.en_definition: (chiefly, obsolete) Mischief; hurt; damage; injury; detriment.

(music) A short, free-form piece of music, originally one serving as an introduction to a longer and more complex piece; later, starting with the Romantic period, generally a stand-alone piece. [from 1650s]
Foremost; first or highest in quality or degree.
(politics, non-Westminster) The government leader in a legislative congress or leader of a government-level administrative body; the head of government.

(medicine, pharmacy, pharmacology) A written order from an authorized medical practitioner for provision of a medicine or other treatment, such as (ophthalmology) the specific lenses needed for a pair of glasses.

examples.english: I'll give you a prescription.
examples.chinese: 我会给你开个药方。

current_entries.en_definition: (now, _, chiefly, _, historical) Private, exclusive; not public; one's own. [from early 13th c.]
Harvested agricultural goods collectively, especially vegetables and fruit, but possibly including eggs, dairy products and meat; the saleable food products of farms.
(transitive) To violate (something sacred); to treat with abuse, irreverence, obloquy, or contempt; to desecrate
An offer made; something proposed for acceptance by another; a tender.
(grammar) A negative imperative.
A planned endeavor, usually with a specific goal and accomplished in several steps or stages.

examples.english: I am proud to be a part of this project.
examples.chinese: 我以身為這個計劃的一份子為榮。

current_entries.en_definition: An object intended to be or having been shot from a weapon.
A place where one takes a walk for leisurely pleasure, or for exercise, especially a terrace by the seaside.

examples.english: Algiers has a beautiful promenade on the seashore.
examples.chinese: 阿尔及尔有一条美丽的海滨长廊。

current_entries.en_definition: (linguistics, grammar) Of, pertaining to, resembling, or functioning as a pronoun.
An object placed against or under another, to support it; anything that supports.
The propeller of an aircraft or boat.
The prostate gland. [from 1646]
A person who does, or offers to do, a demeaning or dishonourable activity for money or personal gain; someone who acts in a dishonourable way for personal advantage. [from 17th c.]
Of, from or relating to Provence, a traditional geographic region roughly corresponding to the modern administrative region of Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.
An item of goods or supplies, especially food, obtained for future use.
Pertaining to the people as a whole, as opposed to a group of people; concerning the whole community or country. [from 15th c.]

examples.english: You will soon get used to speaking in public.
examples.chinese: 你很快就會習慣在公開場合講話了。

current_entries.en_definition: A small, often temporary, pool of water, usually on a path or road. [from 14th c.]
The soft center of a fruit.

examples.english: Reduce to pulp by boiling.
examples.chinese: 藉由煮沸以減少黏漿狀物質。

current_entries.en_definition: A mass of chemically processed wood fibres (cellulose).
A normally regular beat felt when arteries near the skin (for example, at the neck or wrist) are depressed, caused by the heart pumping blood through them.

examples.english: The doctor felt my pulse.
examples.chinese: 医生给我把脉。

current_entries.en_definition: A light, porous type of pyroclastic igneous rock, formed during explosive volcanic eruptions when liquid lava is ejected into water or air as a froth containing masses of gas bubbles, which are frozen into the rock as the lava solidifies.
A food that has been ground or crushed into a thick liquid or paste.
(Christianity) An intermediate state after death in which some of those ultimately destined for Heaven must first undergo purification.
having a colour that is a mixture of red and blue

examples.english: She wore a purple dress.
examples.chinese: 她穿着一條紫色連身裙。

current_entries.en_definition: a colour produced by mixing red and blue

examples.english: Purple is her favourite colour.
examples.chinese: 紫色是她最喜歡的顏色。

current_entries.en_definition: (US) A handbag (small bag usually used by women for carrying various small personal items)

examples.english: It was not until I reached home that I missed my purse.
examples.chinese: 那是在我到家以后，我才不见了我的钱包。

current_entries.en_definition: A quantity of money given for a particular purpose.
To physically place (something or someone somewhere).

examples.english: Put your hands down!
examples.chinese: 放下你的手！

current_entries.en_definition: To bring or set (into a certain relation, state or condition).
A form of cement, made from linseed oil and whiting, used to fix panes of glass.

(constellation) A spring constellation of the southern sky, said to resemble the compass of a ship. It is associated with the larger Argo Navis, although it was never officially part of that constellation.
A four-footed or four-legged animal.
Any of various small game birds of the genera Coturnix, Anurophasis or Perdicula in the Old World family Phasianidae or of the New World family Odontophoridae.
A trembling or shaking.
Level of excellence.

examples.english: Air quality has deteriorated these past few years.
examples.chinese: 这些年空气质量恶化了。

current_entries.en_definition: Something that differentiates a thing or person.
An animal, often a bird or mammal, which is hunted.
A comune of the Aosta Valley autonomous region, Italy.

examples.english: I want a quart of milk.
examples.chinese: 我要一夸脫的牛奶。

current_entries.en_definition: A municipality of Gironès, Comarques Gironines, Girona, Catalonia, Spain.
(geology) The geological period of the Cenozoic Era immediately following the Tertiary. It is subdivided into the Pleistocene and the Holocene Epochs.
Of fourth rank or order.
The language spoken by these people.
Of or pertaining to the Quechua people or language.
A worded or expressed sentence, phrase, or only a word on its own, which asks for information, a reply, or a response; an interrogative.

examples.english: I need to ask you a silly question.
examples.chinese: 我必须问你一个蠢问题。

current_entries.en_definition: A bed covering consisting of two layers of fabric stitched together, with insulation between, often having a decorative design.

examples.english: She folded the quilt.
examples.chinese: 她叠好了被子。

current_entries.en_definition: An idiosyncrasy; a slight glitch, a mannerism; something unusual about the manner or style of something or someone.
(weaponry) A container for arrows, crossbow bolts or darts, such as those fired from a bow, crossbow or blowgun.
A mammal of most genera of the family Leporidae, with long ears, long hind legs and a short, fluffy tail.

examples.english: A rabbit has long ears and a short tail.
examples.chinese: 兔子有长耳朵和短尾巴。

current_entries.en_definition: A series of one or more shelves, stacked one above the other
(historical) A device, incorporating a ratchet, used to torture victims by stretching them beyond their natural limits.
A cut of meat involving several adjacent ribs.
(countable, sports) An implement with a handle connected to a round frame strung with wire, sinew, or plastic cords, and used to hit a ball, such as in tennis or a shuttlecock in badminton.

examples.english: You have the same racket as I have.
examples.chinese: 你的球拍跟我的一樣。

current_entries.en_definition: A loud noise.
An illegal scheme for profit; a fraud or swindle; or both coinstantiated.
(astronomy) The apparent origin, in the night sky, of a meteor shower.
A piece of old cloth, especially one used for cleaning, patching, etc.; a tattered piece of cloth; a shred or tatter.
(slang, pejorative) A newspaper or magazine, especially one whose journalism is considered to be of poor quality.
Violent uncontrolled anger.

(Norse mythology) A series of future events culminating in a battle, fought between the Æsir and einherjar on one side, and the forces of Surtr, Loki, and Loki's children on the other, in which all of creation is burned down and almost all life is extinguished.
(law enforcement) An attack or invasion for the purpose of making arrests, seizing property, or plundering.
To bring into being; to produce; to cause to arise, come forth, or appear.

examples.english: The only useful answers are those that raise new questions.
examples.chinese: 只有能提出新问题的回答才是有用的回答。

current_entries.en_definition: A public gathering or mass meeting that is not mainly a protest and is organized to inspire enthusiasm for a cause.
(motor racing) An event in which competitors drive through a series of timed special stages at intervals. The winner is the driver who completes all stages with the shortest cumulative time.
(zoology, agriculture) A male sheep, typically uncastrated.

examples.english: I don't have enough RAM.
examples.chinese: 我内存不够。

current_entries.en_definition: (often with on, about, or both) To talk or write incessantly, unclearly, or incoherently, with many digressions.
A gentle hike.
(slang, with definite article) The blame for something.

examples.english: Do you like rap?
examples.chinese: 你喜欢说唱音乐吗？

current_entries.en_definition: Very swift or quick.

examples.english: The doctor thought the patient's pulse was rather rapid.
examples.chinese: 医生认为病人的脉搏有点快。

current_entries.en_definition: To abseil.
An outbreak or surge in problems; a spate, string, or trend.
A coarse file or filelike tool, on which the cutting prominences are distinct points raised by the oblique stroke of a sharp punch, instead of lines raised by a chisel, as on the true file.
A pawl, click, or detent for holding or propelling a ratchet wheel, or ratch, etc.
A portion of some limited resource, especially food, allocated to a person or group.
Any of several, generally large and lustrous black species of birds in the genus Corvus, especially the common raven (Corvus corax).
A keen-edged knife of peculiar shape, used in shaving the hair from the face or other parts of the body.
An excuse: a thought or a consideration offered in support of a determination or an opinion; that which is offered or accepted as an explanation.

examples.english: You have good reason to be angry.
examples.chinese: 你有充分的理由生氣。

current_entries.en_definition: The deduction of inferences or interpretations from premises, abstract thought, ratiocination; (countable) any instance of this, especially as a process leading to an action, motive.
A person who resists an established authority, often violently.
To broadcast again.
(transitive) To refuse; to offer sudden or harsh resistance; to turn down or shut out.
That which compensates for an injury, or other type of harm or damage.
To tell; narrate; to relate in detail.

(archaeology) A large rectangular monolith lying on its side, typically flanked by two large upright stones, the flankers; found in recumbent stone circles of Aberdeenshire, Scotland, and the counties of Cork and Kerry in south-west of Ireland.
(usually, transitive) To censor, to black out or remove parts of a document while leaving the remainder.
A chain or range of rocks, sand, or coral lying at or near the surface of the water.

examples.english: The coral reef is the region's prime attraction.
examples.chinese: 珊瑚礁是这个地区的主要景点。

current_entries.en_definition: Information about a person, provided by someone (a referee) with whom they are well acquainted.
An automatic response to a simple stimulus which does not require mental processing.
The chorus or burden of a song repeated at the end of each verse or stanza.
A substance used in a heat cycle that undergoes a phase change between gas and liquid to allow the cooling, as in refrigerators, air conditioners, etc.
A strap or rope attached to a bridle or bit, used to control a horse, animal or young child.
(transitive) To refuse to accept; to forswear.
(athletics) A track and field discipline where runners take turns in carrying a baton from start to finish. The most common events are 4×100 meter and 4×400 meter competitions. [from 19th c.]
(electronics) An electrical actuator that allows a relatively small electrical voltage or current to control a larger voltage or current. [from 19th c.]
A new version of something.
Something that corrects or counteracts.
A medicine, application, or treatment that relieves or cures a disease.
(transitive) To move from one place to another, especially to take away.
(transitive, archaic) To deny; to renounce
The act of repairing something.
(transitive) To do or say again (and again).

examples.english: Could you please repeat that?
examples.chinese: 能不能请你重复一下？

current_entries.en_definition: Temporary cessation from activity to rest and recover, especially in the form of sleep; rest; (countable) an instance of this; a break, a rest; a sleep.
One who speaks for or acts on behalf of another in a particular (especially official) capacity. [from 17th c.]
(music) A repetition of a phrase, a return to an earlier theme, or a second rendition or version of a song in a programme or musical.
A mild rebuke, or an implied criticism.
Disgrace or shame.
Advocating or supporting a republic as a form of government, advocating or supporting republicanism. [from 17th c.]
Essential, indispensable, required.
That which is required by authority; especially, a quota of supplies or necessaries.
(American) A television program shown after its initial presentation, particularly many weeks after its initial presentation; a repeat.

examples.english: This program is a rerun.
examples.chinese: 这个节目是重播。

current_entries.en_definition: (uncountable, countable, _, in some dialects) Diligent inquiry or examination to seek or revise facts, principles, theories, applications, etc. (that are currently available, or that are familiar to one's self).

examples.english: If we knew what we were doing, it wouldn't be called research, would it?
examples.chinese: 如果我们知道我们在做什么，那么这不能称之为研究，是吗？

current_entries.en_definition: A person, animal or plant living at a certain location or in a certain area.
A person who resists; especially a member of a resistance movement.
To have respect for.

examples.english: We must have respect for tradition.
examples.chinese: 我們要尊重傳統文化。

current_entries.en_definition: That which results; the conclusion or end to which any course or condition of things leads, or which is obtained by any process or operation; consequence or effect.

examples.english: You are responsible for the result.
examples.chinese: 你要对结果负责。

current_entries.en_definition: The final product, beneficial or tangible effect(s) achieved by effort.
(transitive) To start (something) again that has been stopped or paused from the point at which it was stopped or paused; continue, carry on. [from 15th c.]
To think again about something, with the intention of changing or replacing it.
To say something sharp or witty in answer to a remark or accusation.
(transitive) To regard someone or something with great awe or devotion.
Veneration; profound awe and respect, normally in a sacred context.
(obsolete) To look at again, to reflect on.
(transitive) To cancel or invalidate by withdrawing or reversing.
(transitive) To write again, differently; to modify; to revise.

examples.english: You should rewrite this sentence.
examples.chinese: 你應該重寫這句話。

current_entries.en_definition: Coarsely, vulgarly, or lewdly amusing; referring to sexual matters in a rude or irreverent way.
Wealthy: having a lot of money and possessions.

examples.english: I know you are rich.
examples.chinese: 我知道你很有钱。

current_entries.en_definition: Of a fuel-air mixture: having more fuel (thus less air) than is necessary to burn all of the fuel; less air- or oxygen- rich than necessary for a stoichiometric reaction.

(seismology) A logarithmic scale used to express the energy released by an earthquake, each increase of 1 representing a 31-fold increase in energy, and a 10-fold increase in the measured wave amplitude.
A verbal puzzle, mystery, or other problem of an intellectual nature.

examples.english: Can you answer this riddle?
examples.chinese: 你猜得出这个迷语吗？

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To criticize or disapprove of someone or something through scornful jocularity; to make fun of.
A repeated melody line in a song, usually instrumental but sometimes vocal.
(transitive) To manipulate something dishonestly for personal gain or discriminatory purposes.
An edge around something, especially when circular.

examples.english: Mary took an egg and cracked it open on the rim of the bowl.
examples.chinese: 瑪麗婭拿了一個雞蛋，並將它在碗沿上敲開。

current_entries.en_definition: Archaic in the form rimes: originally, any frozen dew forming a white deposit on exposed surfaces; hoar frost (sense 1).
(jewelry) A round piece of (precious) metal worn around the finger or through the ear, nose, etc.

examples.english: In case of fire, ring the bell.
examples.chinese: 萬一發生火災，按鈴。

current_entries.en_definition: A tumultuous disturbance of the public peace by a large group of people, often involving violence or damage to property.
Wanton or unrestrained behavior or emotion.
Rebellion.
The probability of a negative outcome to a decision or event.
A common roach (Rutilus rutilus)
(US, slang, smoking) The butt of a marijuana cigarette.
The naturally occurring aggregate of solid mineral matter that constitutes a significant part of the earth's crust.

examples.english: Passing through the strong wind, the planes rock like this, but don't worry.
examples.chinese: 当飞机穿越强风时，它们会像这样摇晃，但是别担心。

current_entries.en_definition: A style of baroque architecture and decorative art, from 18th-century France, having elaborate ornamentation.
(transitive, intransitive) To deploy or release (a new film or software, etc.); to launch (a product or service), especially in a gradual fashion across multiple regions.
A toy that rights itself when pushed over.
A variety of the Romani language (or occasionally) the Romani macrolanguage.

Somewhat resembling the Romans; applied sometimes to the debased style of the later Roman Empire, but especially to the more developed art and architecture prevailing from the 8th century to the 12th.
Of or belonging to the Roma people.
The Indo-Aryan lect of the Roma people, or one of its sublects (such as Roma, Sinti, Romanichal, etc), closely related to Hindi and Rajasthani.
An advocate or follower of romanticism.
A major city, the capital of Italy and the Italian region of Lazio, located on the Tiber River; the ancient capital of the Roman Empire.

examples.english: Rome wasn't built in a day.
examples.chinese: 罗马不是一天建成的。

current_entries.en_definition: (fiction) One of the main characters of Romeo and Juliet by William Shakespeare: the ardent lover of Juliet.
(architecture) The external covering at the top of a building.

examples.english: The roof was damaged by the storm.
examples.chinese: 屋頂被暴風雨損壞了。

current_entries.en_definition: A separate part of a building, enclosed by walls, a floor and a ceiling. [from 15th c.]

examples.english: If you don't have anything to do, look at the ceiling of your room.
examples.chinese: 如果你没事做，那就看你房间的天花板。

current_entries.en_definition: Spacious, expansive, comfortable.
the part of a plant that grows underground and absorbs water and nutrients

examples.english: The tree has deep roots.
examples.chinese: 這棵樹有很深的根。

current_entries.en_definition: the basic cause or origin of something

examples.english: We need to find the root of the problem.
examples.chinese: 我們需要找出問題的根源。

current_entries.en_definition: the basic part of a word from which other words are formed

examples.english: The words share the same Latin root.
examples.chinese: 這些詞有相同的拉丁詞根。

current_entries.en_definition: (organic chemistry) A solid form of resin, obtained from liquid resin by vaporizing its volatile components.
(transitive) To place the name of (a person) on a roster.

A group of (often violent) criminals or gangsters; such people as a class; (more generally) a disorderly and tumultuous crowd, a mob; hence (archaic, preceded by the) , the common people as a group, the rabble.
Someone who engages in rubbernecking, or turning and staring.
A circular frill or ruffle on a garment, especially a starched, fluted frill at the neck in Elizabethan and Jacobean England (1560s–1620s).
A regulation, law, guideline.

examples.english: You broke the rule.
examples.chinese: 你坏了规矩。

current_entries.en_definition: A distilled spirit derived from fermented cane sugar and molasses.

examples.english: Even if you don't like rum, try a glass of this.
examples.chinese: 即使你不喜欢喝朗姆酒，请你尝一杯这个吧。

current_entries.en_definition: A statement or claim of questionable accuracy, from no known reliable source, usually spread by word of mouth.

examples.english: The rumor turned out false.
examples.chinese: 谣言被证明是假的。

current_entries.en_definition: (informal, intransitive) To cause a noisy disturbance or commotion.
Any of the traditional languages of Ryukyu, in modern times predominantly displaced by Japanese.
An extended period of leave from a person's usual pursuits.
A deliberate action aimed at weakening someone (or something, a nation, etc) or preventing them from being successful, through subversion, obstruction, disruption, and/or destruction.
A human being or an animal, or a physical object or immaterial thing (see sense 1.3), offered to a deity.

examples.english: Would it be ethical to sacrifice one person to save many?
examples.chinese: 为了救许多人牺牲一个人是否道德？

current_entries.en_definition: Providing protection from danger; providing shelter.

examples.english: You are in a safe place.
examples.chinese: 您在一个安全的地方。

current_entries.en_definition: Something that serves as a guard or protection; a defense.
(constellation) A small autumn constellation of the northern sky, said to resemble an arrow. It lies between the constellations of Vulpecula and Aquila.
A en given name.

examples.english: That's the stupidest thing I've ever said.
examples.chinese: 那是我说过的最愚蠢的话了。

current_entries.en_definition: A holiday in remembrance of Saint Valentine, February 14th, celebrated by sending cards or similar tokens of love.
A meal or dish made from this fish.

examples.english: The fish tasted like salmon.
examples.chinese: 這魚吃著像三文魚。

current_entries.en_definition: (dance) A Brazilian ballroom dance or dance style.
Not different or other; not another or others; not different as regards self; selfsame; identical.

examples.english: A fox is not caught twice in the same snare.
examples.chinese: 一只狐狸不會兩次掉入同一個陷阱里。

current_entries.en_definition: Something similar, something of the identical type.

examples.english: A fox is not caught twice in the same snare.
examples.chinese: 一只狐狸不會兩次掉入同一個陷阱里。

current_entries.en_definition: The Samoan language.
(mostly, in the plural) A penalty, punishment, or some coercive measure, intended to ensure compliance; especially one adopted by several nations, or by an international body.

examples.english: It is necessary to obtain the sanction of the authorities to enter this building.
examples.chinese: 必須獲得有關當局的批准才能進入這座建築物。

current_entries.en_definition: A dish or foodstuff where at least one piece, but typically two or more pieces, of bread serves as the wrapper or container of some other food.

examples.english: What kind of sandwich do you want?
examples.chinese: 你要什麼樣的三明治？

current_entries.en_definition: The primary language spoken in the Central African Republic.
(typography) Of a typeface, without serifs.
The juice of plants of any kind, especially the ascending and descending juices or circulating fluid essential to nutrition.
A native or inhabitant of Sardinia, Italy.
A Romance language spoken in the Italian region of Sardinia.
A liquid (often thickened) condiment or accompaniment to food.

examples.english: Hunger is the best sauce.
examples.chinese: 饑餓是最好的調味品。
